notes: Fixes welcome, reset-password, and verification email links so they use the deployed OrbitSM host/IP and port instead of localhost. The backend now prefers the configured public URL, then browser Origin/Referer, then proxy forwarded host including non-standard ports such as 8443.
Updates Nginx proxy headers so OrbitSM preserves the external host and port when generating links behind the reverse proxy.
Adds a logged-in user identity badge in the header with initials, name/email, and role so users know which account is active.
Removes the word by from the Reliable Hubs co-branding in the OrbitSM header.
Hides Admin, Deploy, and Updates navigation for non-admin users and redirects non-admin users away from direct /admin routes.
Changes the default access governance mode to RBAC instead of Hybrid for new deployments and fallback configuration.
Preserves existing PostgreSQL database volumes and project data; this patch changes application containers and proxy config only.

Adds a safer one-command customer upgrade script for 1.0.24 that backs up config, pulls images, refreshes proxy config, recreates app containers without docker compose down -v, validates health, and updates Update Center metadata.
